'''ân-l-n''' ('''kanalan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:prease|prease]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:prease|prease]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-l-n
|-
! Lemma
| kanalan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinalan|thinalan]] || [[word:jinalan|jinalan]] || [[word:shinalan|shinalan]] || [[word:kinalan|kinalan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunalan|thuthunalan]] || [[word:jujunalan|jujunalan]] || [[word:shushunalan|shushunalan]] || [[word:kukunalan|kukunalan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunalan|thunalan]] || [[word:junalan|junalan]] || [[word:shunalan|shunalan]] || [[word:kunalan|kunalan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunalan|thunalan]] || [[word:junalan|junalan]] || [[word:shunalan|shunalan]] || [[word:kunalan|kunalan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenalan|thenalan]] || [[word:jenalan|jenalan]] || [[word:shenalan|shenalan]] || [[word:kenalan|kenalan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonalan|thothonalan]] || [[word:jojonalan|jojonalan]] || [[word:shoshonalan|shoshonalan]] || [[word:kokonalan|kokonalan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonalan|thonalan]] || [[word:jonalan|jonalan]] || [[word:shonalan|shonalan]] || [[word:konalan|konalan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonalan|thonalan]] || [[word:jonalan|jonalan]] || [[word:shonalan|shonalan]] || [[word:konalan|konalan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnalan|thĂŠnalan]] || [[word:jĂŠnalan|jĂŠnalan]] || [[word:shĂŠnalan|shĂŠnalan]] || [[word:kĂŠnalan|kĂŠnalan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanalan|thathanalan]] || [[word:jajanalan|jajanalan]] || [[word:shashanalan|shashanalan]] || [[word:kakanalan|kakanalan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanalan|thanalan]] || [[word:janalan|janalan]] || [[word:shanalan|shanalan]] || [[word:kanalan|kanalan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanalan|thanalan]] || [[word:janalan|janalan]] || [[word:shanalan|shanalan]] || [[word:kanalan|kanalan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanalan|shanalan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanalan|goshanalan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanalan|gokishanalan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanalanĂŒ|shanalanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanalanknĂŒ|goshanalanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanalanĂŒ|gokishanalanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanalanshĂ«|shanalanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanalankshĂ«|goshanalankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanalanshĂ«|gokishanalanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanalanro|shanalanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanalankro|goshanalankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanalanro|gokishanalanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanalanmu|shanalanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanalankmu|goshanalankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanalanmu|gokishanalanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanalansher|shanalansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanalanksher|goshanalanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanalansher|gokishanalansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanalang|shanalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanalankng|goshanalankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanalang|gokishanalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanalanya|shanalanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanalankya|goshanalankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanalanya|gokishanalanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanalanyam|shanalanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanalankyam|goshanalankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanalanyam|gokishanalanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanalanĂŒshĂ«|shanalanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanalanknĂŒshĂ«|goshanalanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanalanĂŒshĂ«|gokishanalanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanalanĂŒro|shanalanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanalanknĂŒro|goshanalanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanalanĂŒro|gokishanalanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanalanĂŒmu|shanalanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanalanknĂŒmu|goshanalanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanalanĂŒmu|gokishanalanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanalanshĂ«nĂŒ|shanalanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanalankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanalankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanalanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanalanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanalanshĂ«ro|shanalanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanalankshĂ«ro|goshanalankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanalanshĂ«ro|gokishanalanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanalanshĂ«mu|shanalanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanalankshĂ«mu|goshanalankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanalanshĂ«mu|gokishanalanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanalanronĂŒ|shanalanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanalankronĂŒ|goshanalankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanalanronĂŒ|gokishanalanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanalanroshĂ«|shanalanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanalankroshĂ«|goshanalankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanalanroshĂ«|gokishanalanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanalanromu|shanalanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanalankromu|goshanalankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanalanromu|gokishanalanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanalanmunĂŒ|shanalanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanalankmunĂŒ|goshanalankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanalanmunĂŒ|gokishanalanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanalanmushĂ«|shanalanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanalankmushĂ«|goshanalankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanalanmushĂ«|gokishanalanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanalanmuro|shanalanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanalankmuro|goshanalankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanalanmuro|gokishanalanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5445898}}
